name: Dogtas Kelebek Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Dogtas Kelebek Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells furniture in Turkey. The company offers furniture for living rooms, such as living room sets, corner sets, double and triple seats, and armchairs; dining rooms, including TV units, chairs, brackets, dining tables, and showcases; and bedrooms comprising accessories, cabinets, chests, interior, curbstone, and bed. It also provides bookcases, working tables, and chambers; coffee tables, mirrors, puffs, dresuars, and accessories; and home office products and pedestals. The company offers its products under the Dogtas, Butterfly, Kelebek Kitchen & Bathroom, Love Bed, and Ruum Store brands. In addition, it exports its products in 15 countries. The company was founded in 1935 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
